intentSynonyms: get a slide content in powerpoint
look up a slide content in powerpoint
fetch a single slide content in powerpoint
view one specific slide content in powerpoint
get text and notes for a specific slide in powerpoint
description: Get detailed text content and speaker notes for a specific slide by number (1-indexed). Downloads the PPTX file and extracts all text and notes.

item_id.description: Item ID of the PowerPoint file
